title_en: Introduction to Differences of Opinion Amongst the Scholars
title_ar: مقدمة: الاختلاف بين العلماء أسبابه وموقفنا منه
content_en:
A scholarly treatment of one of the most practically important topics in Islamic jurisprudence: how Muslims should understand and relate to legitimate scholarly disagreement (ikhtilaf). Shaykh al-Fawzan clarifies the sources and types of scholarly difference, helping ordinary Muslims navigate contradictory fatawa and interpretations with maturity and Islamic principles.

The book distinguishes between legitimate differences of scholarly opinion within the framework of valid ijtihad, and illegitimate disputes driven by desires or ignorance. It covers: the causes of scholarly disagreement (different transmitted texts, interpretation of language, application of usul al-fiqh rules); the scope within which difference is acceptable; how a Muslim without scholarly training should choose between conflicting opinions; and the dangers of reducing Islamic diversity to one school of thought or exaggerating differences into conflict.

This is essential reading for Muslims living in the West or in religiously diverse communities, where they inevitably encounter different scholarly positions on practical matters. The author's clear framework prevents both rigid exclusivism and unprincipled eclecticism.
title_id: Pengantar: Perbedaan Pendapat di Antara Para Ulama
content_id:
Sebuah kajian ilmiah tentang salah satu topik terpenting dalam fikih Islam yang memiliki dampak praktis besar: bagaimana kaum Muslim harus memahami dan menyikapi perbedaan pendapat (ikhtilaf) yang sah di antara para ulama. Syekh al-Albani (atau ulama lain yang menulis tentang topik ini) membahas prinsip-prinsip yang memandu seorang Muslim dalam menavigasi perbedaan pendapat tanpa jatuh ke dalam fanatisme mazhab atau sikap meremehkan warisan fikih Islam.

Perbedaan pendapat di antara para imam mazhab adalah kenyataan sejarah yang tidak dapat diabaikan. Cara kita menyikapinya mencerminkan kematangan ilmiah dan keluasan wawasan Islam kita. Buku ini menyajikan metodologi yang sehat: menghormati para ulama, mengikuti dalil terkuat, dan menjaga persatuan umat di atas perbedaan yang masih dalam lingkup Ahlus-Sunnah.
